creator: s@samu.pl
text:
Dear Sir/Madam

I am the author of the sysutils/bsdinfo Port. I'd like to inform you, that the website URL will be changed from http://cloud.github.com/downloads/samaelszafran/bsdinfo/ to http://cloud.github.com/downloads/samupl/bsdinfo/. 

I'm attaching a Makefile patch for this port.

-- 
Yours Sincerely,
Jakub Szafrański

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
